originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&flags` is never used.

presenceCondition: (and (= CROSS_COMPILE false) (= WIN32 false) (= NEED_ENHANCED_ESCAPES false))
model:
(define-fun WIN32 () Bool
  false)
(define-fun NEED_ENHANCED_ESCAPES () Bool
  false)
(define-fun CROSS_COMPILE () Bool
  false)
reasoning: flags is written at L42 (flags |= T_ESCAPE_SHELL_CMD in the \!NEED_ENHANCED_ESCAPES path) but is never subsequently read — the loop body has no use of flags after setting it. Genuine dead store. No ERROR comment and no TRUE record for c76df14dfb4.c; same new bug as PRODUCT_45 (already TRUE_NEW_OVER) at the same line. The dead store at L42 occurs for all \!NEED_ENHANCED_ESCAPES configs: CROSS_COMPILE=T always gives \!NEED_ENHANCED_ESCAPES (macro not defined), and CROSS_COMPILE=F + \!WIN32 also gives \!NEED_ENHANCED_ESCAPES. The PC {CROSS_COMPILE=F, WIN32=F, NEED_ENHANCED_ESCAPES=F} covers only one of these combos, missing CROSS_COMPILE=T configs. Over-constrained (too narrow).
